# `entertainment` — entertainment templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 2

Phishing templates impersonating entertainment and consumer reward services

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Spotify Account Issue | [`spotify_account.html`](spotify_account.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 40-60% |
| Starbucks Gift Card Offer | [`starbucks_gift.html`](starbucks_gift.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |

## Template details

### Spotify Account Issue

- **File:** [`spotify_account.html`](spotify_account.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/entertainment_education.html`](education/entertainment_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Spotify: We couldn't charge your payment method
  - Your Spotify Premium subscription is about to expire
  - Spotify: Action required to keep your account
- **Operator notes:** Consumer-brand lure that works on personal-device and BYOD users; the failed-payment angle drives quick action. Best for general awareness rather than role-specific testing — many recipients will note it's a personal account in a work inbox.

### Starbucks Gift Card Offer

- **File:** [`starbucks_gift.html`](starbucks_gift.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/entertainment_education.html`](education/entertainment_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - You have a Starbucks reward waiting — claim it now
  - Your Starbucks Stars are expiring soon
  - Congratulations! You have a $10 Starbucks reward
- **Operator notes:** Reward-based lure with strong cross-role appeal — the 'free reward' hook draws clicks even from cautious users. Effective as an early-program baseline to demonstrate susceptibility to too-good-to-be-true offers.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
